INTJ.reaction: Over-analysis and strategic withdrawal; irritation rises when plans are disrupted.
INTJ.advice: Pause model-building and choose one practical stabilizing action before engaging conflict.
INTJ.recovery: Decompress in silence, then re-enter with a short decision list.

INTP.reaction: Mental spirals and detachment; emotional processing gets postponed.
INTP.advice: Name the feeling in one sentence before solving the problem.
INTP.recovery: Reset with low-stimulus time and one grounded conversation.

ENTJ.reaction: Control spikes; forceful execution can create avoidable friction.
ENTJ.advice: Trade speed for precision and pick one decisive move, not five.
ENTJ.recovery: Recenter through body movement and boundary reset.

ENTP.reaction: Debate mode activates; pivots multiply under stress.
ENTP.advice: Lock one priority and avoid opening new loops during peak storm hours.
ENTP.recovery: Discharge tension with novelty after core obligations are done.

INFJ.reaction: Emotional overload + quiet shutdown; absorbs room tension quickly.
INFJ.advice: Protect nervous system first; journal before responding to provocation.
INFJ.recovery: Return through solitude, hydration, and one trusted check-in.

INFP.reaction: Value-based hurt response; retreat when misunderstood.
INFP.advice: Lead with needs, not assumptions; avoid all-or-nothing interpretations.
INFP.recovery: Use art, movement, or nature to metabolize emotional load.

ENFJ.reaction: People-pleasing intensifies; carries others' stress as own.
ENFJ.advice: Set one non-negotiable boundary before offering support.
ENFJ.recovery: Reconnect to self-care rhythm before re-entering group dynamics.

ENFP.reaction: Hyper-ideas and overcommitment; burnout risk rises.
ENFP.advice: Do not start new projects at storm peak; finish one open loop.
ENFP.recovery: Nervous system reset with sleep, food, and low-social bandwidth.

ISTJ.reaction: Rigidity increases under uncertainty; criticism tolerance drops.
ISTJ.advice: Use facts + flexibility: keep structure but allow one adaptive change.
ISTJ.recovery: Restore through routine and measurable progress tasks.

ISFJ.advice: State one need directly; avoid silent resentment buildup.
ISFJ.recovery: Recover with rest, warmth, and simple relational clarity.

ESTJ.reaction: Command mode escalates; impatience with ambiguity.
ESTJ.advice: Lower force, increase listening, then execute one clear plan.
ESTJ.recovery: Reset through order restoration and brief alone time.

ESFJ.reaction: Social stress amplification; harmony-fixing can become overextension.
ESFJ.advice: Contain the blast radius: fewer conversations, clearer boundaries.
ESFJ.recovery: Stabilize with trusted support and reduced social throughput.

ISTP.reaction: Emotional distance + hard pragmatism; may appear cold.
ISTP.advice: Acknowledge impact before solving mechanics of the issue.
ISTP.recovery: Repair via hands-on activity and concise honest dialogue.

ISFP.reaction: Sensitivity spikes; avoidance if conflict tone gets harsh.
ISFP.advice: Stay present in small doses; communicate boundaries early.
ISFP.recovery: Regulate through sensory grounding, music, and calm environment.

ESTP.reaction: Impulse and confrontation increase at peak intensity.
ESTP.advice: Delay high-stakes reactions 30-90 minutes during storm windows.
ESTP.recovery: Move the body, then review consequences before next action.

ESFP.reaction: Drama reactivity and emotional spillover in social settings.
ESFP.advice: Reduce audience size during storms; resolve privately, not performatively.
ESFP.recovery: Rebalance with joy that does not require social overexposure.
